textByHash.6f8a719760e21ace280ef3b53e9827cae0ec24af: I'm now a member of the counshil of eblars? Thanksh a lot buddy! (hic) Letsh have a drink to celebrate!
textByHash.78c07e69d45dbd44d06782973246ce4641e84bd8: Hey! scheck it out! Itsh an outerlandub! Yer shud go shpeak to the chieftain!
textByHash.3450b186f1dedf1bad756c69ef33c59a6370c08e: That guy over there by that stuff! (hic) Yeh, abshoultely! He's da bosh!
textByHash.e01cdb47d6e6001ee00128f24226080df29293e0: Nah nah nah, not them, the other one, whatshyerfashe!
textByHash.a319000c3e74ca342d04570588a5e337f68fc752: Thatsh what I said diddle I?
